recommendations.title: Juan of the Dead

recommendations.title: Tokyo Ghoul
recommendations.overview: A Tokyo college student is attacked by a ghoul, a super-powered human who feeds on human flesh. He survives, but has become part ghoul and becomes a fugitive on the run.

recommendations.title: Dawn of the Dead
recommendations.overview: A group of survivors take refuge in a shopping mall after the world is taken over by aggressive, flesh-eating zombies.

recommendations.title: Night of the Comet
recommendations.overview: After a comet wipes out most of life on Earth, two Valley Girls find themselves fighting against cannibal zombies and a sinister group of scientists.

recommendations.title: Go Goa Gone
recommendations.overview: A rave party off the coast of Goa goes horrifyingly and hilariously wrong when the island is overrun with zombies.

recommendations.title: [REC]³ Genesis
recommendations.overview: A pair of newlyweds must fight to survive when their wedding reception descends into chaos and carnage when their guests become infected by a virus that turns them into hungry zombies.

recommendations.title: Day of the Dead: Bloodline
recommendations.overview: In a world overrun by zombies, military personnel and survivalists live in an underground bunker while they seek a cure.

recommendations.title: Zombie Massacre
